meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build a high-converting client workflow to overcome the no-portfolio barrier. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap by building a 'Proof-of-Value' project. Use Antigravity to scaffold a professional SaaS landing page and Claude Code to iterate features rapidly. Focus on one high-impact, real-world utility that demonstrates your ability to solve a client's specific business pain point, not just generic code.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the freelancer's greatest enemy. You have the skills, but without a portfolio, you are invisible to high-paying clients. The anxiety of 'no experience' creates a paralysis that keeps you stuck in the loop of low-bid platforms, trading your time for pennies while your potential remains untapped.

But the game has changed. You no longer need years of history to prove your worth. By leveraging a high-velocity client workflow, you can build a production-grade 'Proof-of-Value' project in hours, not weeks. This is your blueprint for transforming from an unproven beginner into a high-demand AI builder.

steps.title: Define the High-Value Business Utility
steps.description: Identify a small, painful problem for a niche client (e.g., automated lead follow-up). Focus on utility over complexity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a senior SaaS architect. Generate a project scope for a lead management tool that solves the problem of high lead drop-off for real estate agents. Include a feature list, tech stack (Next.js, Tailwind, Supabase), and a database schema.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a project plan for a real estate lead manager with these specifications'

steps.title: Scaffold the Core Infrastructure
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the foundational boilerplate, ensuring professional folder structure and type safety.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a full-stack Next.js 14 boilerplate with App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI components. Ensure the project is production-ready.

steps.title: Build the 'Hook' UI
steps.description: Create a high-converting landing page that demonstrates the value proposition immediately to potential clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a landing page component using Shadcn UI that features a hero section, a 'How it works' grid, and a call-to-action section. Focus on clean, modern design for a B2B SaaS product.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'implement the landing page components based on the generated design'

steps.title: Implement the Core Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to automate the backend logic for your utility, ensuring it handles data efficiently.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Server Action to handle form submissions from the landing page and insert the data into a Supabase table. Include error handling and validation using Zod.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code 'create a server action for lead capture with Zod validation'

steps.title: Deploy and Showcase
steps.description: Deploy to Vercel and create a 'Build-in-Public' case study document that explains the 'why' behind your code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a README.md file that highlights the business problem, the technical solution, and the performance metrics of the app. Structure it as a portfolio case study.

pro_tips: Prioritize 'UI-first' development; clients judge your code by the look of the interface first.
Always document the 'why' behind your architectural choices in your repo's README.
Use Claude Code to refactor your code for performance; it identifies bottlenecks you might miss.
Create a 'demo mode' for your app so clients can experience it without needing to create an account.
Focus on one micro-service that solves a single, expensive problem rather than building a bloated dashboard.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, record a 60-second Loom video walking through the app, embed it in your portfolio site, and start pitching it to 5 potential clients in your chosen niche.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be a developer. Your portfolio is built by what you ship today, not what you planned yesterday. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
